data.title: Cineplex reports March box office surge
data.description:
• Cineplex (CPXGF) on Friday reported March box office revenue of $52.4 million, compared with $29.5 million a year earlier, as first-quarter box office reached $127.4 million versus $101.9 million in 2025.
  • The company said March results were driven by several film releases, while five titles exceeded $100 million in domestic box office during the quarter, compared with two a year earlier.
  • Cineplex added that international content contributed to performance, including a Hindi-language film that set a North American box office record for its category.
  • Momentum continued into April, with a recent release delivering the company’s highest grossing Easter weekend on record.
  • CPXGF +0.21% after hours to $7.9267.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Telix rises as imaging agent for brain cancer granted FDA review
data.description:
• Telix Pharmaceuticals (TLX) added ~7% in the premarket on Friday after the Australian biotech announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration ((FDA)) accepted its marketing application for TLX101-Px, an imaging agent targeting brain cancer.
  • Also known as Pixclara, TLX101-Px is a PET imaging candidate designed to characterize recurrent or progressive forms of glioma, a type of brain cancer, from treatment-related changes in adults and children.
  • Last month, Telix (TLX) resubmitted its New Drug Application for TLX101-Px after the FDA declined to approve its initial NDA, requesting additional data from the company regarding its diagnostic performance.
  • The regulator has accepted the resubmitted NDA, assigning September 11, 2026, as the target action date, the company said, adding that its 2026 financial outlook doesn’t account for any revenue that it could generate from TLX101-Px.

data.title: Endurance Gold raises $2.8M from warrants and options exercise
data.description:
• Endurance Gold (EDG:CA) (OTCQB: ENDGF) on Friday said that it has raised $2.8 million through the exercise of 7.0 million warrants at $0.32 and 1.65 million stock options at $0.34 by insiders.
  • The company said the proceeds will be used for general working capital and to support its fully funded Reliance Exploration Program.

  • Endurance Gold is focused on advancing its Reliance Gold Project in British Columbia.

  • ENDGF closed -3.77% at $0.362.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: European defense stocks dive as Ukraine peace hopes rise; construction and materials cos rise
data.description:
• Shares of major European defense contractors fell sharply on Friday, with CSG NV down about 9.7%, Rheinmetall (RNMBF) off 5.7%, and Leonardo (DRS) declining roughly 5% after reports of progress toward a Ukraine-Russia deal. 
  • Hensoldt (HAGHY) was down 7%, and BAE Systems (BAE) fell 3%. Swedish fighter jet maker Saab (SAABF) dipped 3.3%.
  • European construction and materials stocks, however, rose, with Buzzi ((BZZUY), Holcim (HCMLF), and Heidelberg Materials (HDLMY) climbing between 4.3% and 4.8% as investors anticipated that progress toward peace could boost reconstruction and infrastructure demand across the region.
  • Kyrylo Budanov, a former military spy and one of Ukrainian president Volodymyr Zelenskiy’s key aides, expressed optimism that negotiations could be nearing a settlement, according to a Bloomberg report Friday.
  • Elsewhere, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Thursday said that the country had agreed to negotiate with Lebanon “as soon as possible.”

data.title: TotalEnergies, Saudi Aramco say refinery shut due to war-related damage
data.description:
TotalEnergies (TTE) said Friday that the SATORP refinery complex it owns jointly with Saudi Aramco (ARMCO) has been shut down after sustaining damage earlier this week in the Middle East war.

The site was affected by incidents that occurred April 7-8, causing damage to one of the refinery's two processing trains, the French company said, adding that it is conducting ⁠an assessment ​of the consequences for the ​refinery's operations; no casualties were reported.

The SATORP site in ​the eastern Saudi ​city of ⁠Jubail processes 465K bbl/day of crude oil, making it one of ​the world's largest refining platforms; Aramco (ARMCO) owns 62.5% of SATORP, while TotalEnergies (TTE) holds a 37.5% interest.

TotalEnergies (TTE), which analysts say is particularly exposed to disruption to upstream production capacity at risk from the war, has shut down or is shutting down production in Qatar, Iraq, and offshore United Arab Emirates, representing ~15% of total output and 10% of upstream cash flow for the company.

Saudi Arabia has said attacks on its energy facilities have cut its oil production capacity by ~600K bbl/day and throughput ​on its East-West pipeline to the Red Sea by ~700K bbl/day.

data.title: Concorde announces ticker change to YOOV following acquisition
data.description:
• Concorde International Group (CIGL) announced it will change its ticker symbol to “YOOV” following the completion of its acquisition of YOOV Group.
  • The company has entered into an all-share merger agreement with YOOV, valuing the AI automation firm at $600M.
  • Post-merger, YOOV will become a wholly owned subsidiary, and Concorde plans to rebrand and adopt the YOOV name and ticker.
  • "The adoption of the ticker symbol "YOOV" reflects our strategic evolution into a broader technology-driven platform, as we integrate complementary capabilities to strengthen our overall value propositions," said said Alan Chua, Chairman and CEO.

data.title: Court delays judgment in Klarna antitrust case against Google
data.description:
Klarna Group (KLAR), the fintech known for its pay-over-time financing options, received notification that Sweden's Patent and Market Court has postponed the delivery of its judgment in the antitrust damages proceedings brought by Klarna subsidiary PriceRunner against Google (GOOG) (GOOGL), the company said on Friday.

The court rescheduled the publication of its judgment to June 10, 2026, at 11:00 CET from its originally scheduled date of April 15, saying it needed "additional time to finalize the judgment." The court didn't provide any further reasoning for the delay, Klarna (KLAR) said.

Klarna (KLAR) stock rose 0.8% in premarket trading. Shares in Google parent Alphabet (GOOG) (GOOGL) edged up 0.2%.

The lawsuit is based on the European Commission's 2017 decision that Google abused its dominance of online comparison shopping. The decision was upheld in September 2024. PriceRunner alleges that Google systematically demoted competing price comparison services in its search results in favor of its own Google Shopping product.

Klarna (KLAR) cautions that the outcome of the proceedings is inherently uncertain. "No assurance can be given that PriceRunner will succeed on liability or quantum," it said. Furthermore, any award would be subject to appeal by Google (GOOG), to sharing arrangements with former PriceRunner shareholders and Klarna’s litigation funder, and to applicable taxation.

data.title: Cascades trims Q1 EBITDA range to $115M–$120M; reaffirms 2026 profit goal
NexLiving Communities reports Q4 results
data.description: NexLiving Communities (NXLV:CA) : Q4 FFO increased +53% to C$2.0 million and fully diluted FFO per share increased +53% to C$0.06.

data.title: Meta AI app downloads on App Store surge after Muse Spark AI model: ST
data.description:
Downloads of Meta Platforms' (META) AI app on iOS in the U.S. saw an increase of 87% day-over-day on April 8, when the company released its new model called Muse Spark, according to market intelligence firm Sensor Tower.

Muse Spark is the first AI model developed by the company's Superintelligence team and is aimed at products.

On the U.S. Apple App Store rankings charts on April 8, Meta AI rose to the 21st spot, up from 60 on April 7, analyst Abe Yousef noted in the report. Meta AI saw about 46,000 U.S. iOS app downloads on April 8, representing an increase of 87% day-over-day.

"This massive surge in downloads could be attributed to the recent release of Meta’s new AI model, Muse Spark, which may have prompted a rise in consumer interest," said the analyst.

However, U.S. downloads of Meta AI on Android only grew 3% day-over-day on April 8, the report added.

Downloads of the app on iOS in Canada, the U.K., France, and Germany surged 51%, 32%, 27%, and 25% day-over-day, respectively. 

Data from the firm indicated that daily web visitors for Meta AI in the U.S. soared over 450% day-over-day. Daily web visitors for the app in the U.S. reached an all-time high on April 8, showcasing how the release of new models, features, and functions can prompt a material uptick in adoption and usage, the analyst noted.

Daily web visitors for Meta AI in the U.S. on April 8 grew more than 570% compared to the average registered in the previous 30 days, the analyst added.

In addition, the analyst noted that four out of the five top-ranked overall apps on the U.S. Apple App Store on April 9 were AI apps — OpenAI's (OPENAI) ChatGPT, Anthropic's (ANTHRO) Claude, Google's (GOOG) (GOOGL) Gemini, and Meta AI — highlighting how app adoption trends are being primarily driven by AI.

A year ago, on April 10, 2025, only one out of the top five ranked overall apps on the U.S. Apple App Store was an AI app, which was ChatGPT, the report added.

Initial benchmarks from Artificial Analysis suggested that Meta’s Muse Spark ranked in the upper tier of AI models but trailed leaders like Google, Anthropic, and OpenAI.
